race.comment: RIMBAUD (3) raced handy then battled on well to hold third over 1300m at Warwick Farm two runs back. No explanation for a poor subsequent effort at the Kensington track. Best form stacks up nicely in a race of this class so give him another chance. BROADWAY FOLLIES (12) wound up powerfully from next to last to be beaten a length when fresh from a long spell over 1200m at Gosford last time out. Ideally placed out to this trip with that run under the belt. The wide gate is the only knock. KOIOS (2) made it two in a row when he closed hard to just arrive in time in a BM82 over 1250m at Taree recently. Goes up sharply in the weights but this isn't as tough. The hat trick is not out of reach. REAL BAKER (10) looks the leader and can take some catching back in this grade.
